text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I head out to observe a<n>winning concert.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... There simply must be away to overcome this dilemma in amore excellent fashion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, yes. I'm gathering reference<n>and
preparing for my inevitable<n>winning concert!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To all Umamusume, the winning<n>concert is a
place where they can truly<n>shine. However!
There is but one<n>major issue!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is... the matter of time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I only get to perform but a single<n>song! How can I
possibly show the<n>audience the full extent of my
charm in<n>so little time?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if only they would allow us to<n>increase the
tempo of the pieces!<n>Perhaps then I could
squeeze in a few<n>more!
choice_data_list:
It's better to perform with everything you've got
within the time you're allotted.
It's important to think outside the box.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Perform with everything I've got? Ah!<n>That's it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rather than risk overstaying my<n>welcome and
becoming a bore, I<n>should use my time to leave
an<n>impact! Is my interpretation correct?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! What an exemplary<n>suggestion!
That's quite astute of<n>you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even if it is only a single song, I'm<n>certain I can
put on the most<n>memorable performance for the<n>
audience!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Time to create a dazzling performance<n>that only I,
T.M. Opera O, am capable<n>of!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Yes, that is exactly<n>what I shall do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Some day, I shall claim the title of<n>Centurial
Overlord and illuminate the<n>world with my
presence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As the sun shines unfettered in the<n>sky, so, too,
must I reign free of any<n>restraints!
